steps: 1. The cost of one bag of sweets is £p. 2. The cost of 3 bags of sweets is 3 times the cost of one bag. 3. In algebra, 3 times p is written as 3p. 4. Check the options: A) p + 3 is addition, not multiplication. B) 3p matches. C) p ÷ 3 is division. D) p - 3 is subtraction. E) 3 + p is addition (same as A but order reversed). 5. Only 3p correctly represents the cost of 3 bags.
